description_long: This object is a row of modern, single-story houses with attached garages, each separated by low fences. The houses feature flat roofs and large windows, with a clean, minimalist design. The front area includes paved driveways and parking spaces, some of which are occupied by cars. The interiors are partially visible, showing open-plan layouts with distinct living, kitchen, and bedroom areas. The exterior color palette is predominantly white and light gray, with occasional blue accent walls. Street lamps line the front, enhancing the urban residential feel.
description: A row of modern, single-story houses with flat roofs, attached garages, and paved driveways, featuring large windows and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garages, driveways, parked cars, and main entrances of the houses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the garages, the arrangement of the houses, and the blue accent walls in some interiors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, rear windows, and the overall layout of the house interiors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garages, driveways, and the arrangement of rooms within each house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main doors with direct access from paved driveways, no porch, minimal overhang, and low dividing fences.
